title: clinopodium marifolium
intro: Clinopodium marifolium, also known as Clinopodium vulgare ssp. marifolium or wild marjoram, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems due to its carminative, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Clinopodium marifolium include relief from indigestion, bloating, and nausea, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate congestion. Clinopodium marifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils for various therapeutic uses.
